entities.cat: a black cat on the left armrest
entities.dog: a golden retriever on the right cushion

scenes.title: The Living Room Standoff
scenes.background_prompt: A living room with a large L-shaped couch, a coffee table, a rug, a TV on the wall, and soft afternoon light. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A living room in soft afternoon light. A large L-shaped beige couch sits in the center. On the far left armrest, a sleek black cat with bright yellow eyes perches stiffly, back arched slightly, ears flattened, staring to the right. On the far right cushion of the couch, a golden retriever lies with its chin on its paws, side-eyeing the cat from the opposite end, a low wrinkle on its brow. The middle cushions of the couch are completely empty — a vast no-man's-land between the two animals. Neither is relaxed; both are hyper-aware of the other. A coffee table with a stack of magazines and a remote control sits in front of the couch. A rug with a geometric pattern covers the floor. A TV mounted on the wall shows a paused nature documentary.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place cat on the far left armrest of the couch, perching stiffly with back arched slightly, ears flattened, staring right. Place dog on the far right cushion, lying with chin on paws, side-eyeing the cat. Middle cushions completely empty.
scenes.scene_description: In this children's picture-book scene of a living room, dark brown wooden floorboards run horizontally across the bottom. On the far left, a long, light blue curtain hangs from the ceiling to the floor next to a large window. A large L-shaped sectional sofa with a yellowish-tan frame and dark green cushions occupies the left and center of the room. A dark green fringed throw blanket is draped over the leftmost arm of the sofa. A small black cat with a grumpy expression and yellow eyes stands on the top backrest of the sofa's left corner, looking toward the right. In the center foreground, a large circular rug with concentric rings of light blue, white, orange, and dark blue sits on the floor. A rectangular wooden coffee table with four thick legs is positioned in the middle of the rug. On the right side of the sofa, a golden-colored dog lies down on a green cushion, resting its head on its paws with a somber expression while looking toward the cat. To the right of the rug, a low wooden TV stand features a small open shelf holding a dark blue electronic console. Above the stand, a large black flat-screen TV is mounted on a light beige wall that has a subtle, repeating pattern of light brown leaves. Bright sunlight enters from the right, casting diagonal highlights across the TV screen and the wall. In the background, large windows reveal a bright outdoor setting under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Outside, there is a green lawn with small white and yellow flowers, and several large, rounded green trees with thick brown trunks. The light blue curtains frame the window on both the left and right sides of the central window pane.

CH: a grumpy black cat with yellow eyes
a somber golden dog lying down
S: a sunlit living room with large windows
a bright day with fluffy white clouds
a cozy room with a wooden floor
IE: the cat staring at the dog
the dog watching the cat from the sofa
IR: the dog feeling sad or lonely
P: the cat wanting to jump down
the dog wanting to take a nap
A: the cat standing on the sofa backrest
the dog resting its head on its paws
CO: the cat and dog are keeping distance
the living room stays quiet and still

ENP: a colorful circular rug with rings
a dark green fringed throw blanket
SC: when the sun shines through the window
